title: Make Draft URL accessible from main app page

requirements.summary: Render the existing LiveSiteSection in the main App layout so users can copy the Draft URL and manage a locally-saved Live URL via the existing UI flows.
acceptanceCriteria: The main page renders the existing LiveSiteSection (frontend/src/components/LiveSiteSection.tsx) somewhere sensible (e.g., below the calculator/actions or above the footer).
The Draft URL is visible and can be copied via the provided UI, showing success/error toasts as currently implemented.
The Live URL input/save/clear/copy/open flows work as currently implemented, and the saved live URL persists via localStorage across page reloads.
All user-facing text remains in English.

file_operations.description: Import and render the existing LiveSiteSection component within the App page layout (place it in a sensible location such as below CalculatorActions and/or below ResultsSection, while keeping the current single-column spacing). Ensure it uses the existing toast/Toaster behavior already present in the app and does not introduce any publish-to-live functionality beyond the current informational UI. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
